gallery-white.$description: Gallery White — Card surfaces, input fields, button text on dark fills, nav surface over dark strips

canvas-mist.$description: Canvas Mist — Page background; also functions as the universal hairline border (borderColor 572 occurrences across every context) — the system draws structure with the canvas color itself

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, logo, nav labels, body copy — the strongest type color, never used as a surface

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — High-contrast neutral action fill for primary buttons on light surfaces.

fog.$description: Fog — Muted accents, icon fills at rest, secondary surface tint, subtle dividers where Canvas Mist is too light

graphite.$description: Graphite — Secondary/muted text — helper copy, metadata in transaction cards, footer body, link at rest

reckless.$description: All display and heading copy. Weight 300 at the largest sizes (48-60px) is the signature move — most gallery/marketplace sites use 600-700 serif weights; the light cut reads as editorial restraint rather than shouting authority. Weight 400 takes over for 20-36px subheadings. Line-height collapses from 1.40 at 20px to 1.00 at 60px, letting large display text sit tight like a magazine cover.

inter.$description: All UI chrome: nav labels, button text, body paragraphs, helper copy, card metadata. Inter is deliberately invisible here — it serves Reckless by getting out of the way. Weight 500 appears in nav and active states; 400 is the body default. Line-height opens up to 1.50 at 16px for paragraph readability.

monument-grotesk.$description: Footer column labels ('Product', 'Partners', 'Company', 'Support', 'Get the App') and the copyright line. Acts as a structural label typeface — small caps category architecture under a serif body. Strictly 12px, weight 400, used at 11 occurrences, signaling intentional scarcity.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background and the default border color — one neutral does both jobs to keep the palette lean

card.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated panels (royalty transaction cards, feature cells) sitting on the canvas

inverted-strip.$description: Surface level 2: Full-bleed dark band for the download-app notification and the only filled CTA
